tags: Fully serviced vintage analog polysynth with new voice chips. Excellent condition.
content:
# Roland Juno-106 Analog Synthesizer

Selling my beloved Juno-106. This synth has been fully serviced with all six voice chips replaced with Analogue Renaissance clones. No more failing voices!

## Condition
- Cosmetically 8/10 (minor wear on sliders)
- Functionally 10/10 (all voices, chorus, everything works)
- Original power cable included

## Why I'm selling
Downsizing my studio. Prefer local pickup but can ship at buyer's expense.

DM me for more photos or questions.
